title: Three-Tier Architecture Graphic — Data Schema
description: Input data for reference/graphic-templates/three-tier-architecture/template.html. Produces a dark-canvas, red-accent architecture diagram with three horizontal tiers (Enterprise → GCC/Theater → Tactical Edge), security/DDIL boundaries between tiers, and a footer strip. The bottom (Edge) tier gets accent treatment (red border, red fill tint) to emphasize it as the proposal's center of gravity.

title.description: Main title across the top — ~8-12 words. All caps applied by CSS, no need to uppercase in data.

subtitle.description: One-line sentence under the title. Context / positioning.

tiers.description: Exactly 3 tiers, in visual order: top (Enterprise), middle (GCC/Theater), bottom (Tactical Edge — accented). Order MATTERS.

subtitle.description: Middle-dot-separated list of examples (e.g., 'CDAO · Pentagon · National Labs'). 3-5 items.

components.description: Exactly 4 component labels — one per column in this tier. 2-5 words each. Positions are SVG-fixed, so array index = column.

pill.description: The highlighted pill/badge at the bottom of this tier (e.g., 'ENTERPRISE MODEL REGISTRY'). All caps applied by CSS.

boundaries.description: Exactly 2 boundaries — one between tier 0 and tier 1, one between tier 1 and tier 2. Each describes the transition (security boundary, DDIL boundary, etc.) and the arrow labels in both directions.

label.description: Badge text on the boundary line (e.g., 'SECURITY BOUNDARY').

down_arrow_label.description: Label on the downward arrow (flow from upper tier to lower). 1-3 words.

up_arrow_label.description: Label on the upward arrow (flow from lower tier to upper). 1-3 words.

brand.description: Company brand shorthand in footer-left (e.g., 'ACME DEFENSE').

theme.description: Optional color overrides. Defaults are a neutral dark canvas with a single accent — override these via the configured brand palette in my-company/branding/.
